featureName: Sprint 2 — Task Detail, Bids, Chat & Payments
description: Complete the core transactional loop for NeighbourGo: detailed task view, full bid flow, real-time chat, and Stripe escrow payments.

userStories.title: Task Detail Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see full task details with role-appropriate actions so I can manage or apply for tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create/update lib/features/tasks/presentation/screens/task_detail_screen.dart
Show photo carousel, category emoji, urgency, title, description, info rows (location, budget, status, neighbourhood, duration), and poster info card
Poster view: Mark Complete button (inProgress/assigned), Message Provider button, BidListSection
Provider view: Submit Bid button (if open), own bid status card, Message Poster button (if assigned)
Locked state for providers when task is not open and they are not the assignee
flutter analyze passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Bid Flow
userStories.description: As a provider, I want to submit bids and as a poster I want to accept/reject them.
acceptanceCriteria: SubmitBidSheet: amount input, duration chips (1h/2h/half-day/full-day/custom), proposal textarea (min 20 chars)
BidListSection: shows all bids for a task with provider avatar, name, amount, status badge, message
Accept bid: calls acceptBid() which batch-updates bid status + task status, then navigates to CheckoutScreen
Reject bid: calls rejectBid() on individual bid
flutter analyze passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Real-Time Chat
userStories.description: As a user, I want to message the poster/provider directly so we can coordinate task details.
acceptanceCriteria: ChatListScreen shows all user chats ordered by lastMessageTime with unread badge
ChatThreadScreen shows real-time messages with timestamps, supports text + image messages
Message bubbles: right-aligned for current user (blue), left-aligned for others (gray)
Image picker integration for sending photos
_MessageButton in TaskDetailScreen calls createOrGetChat() and navigates to ChatThreadScreen
flutter analyze passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Stripe Escrow Payment
userStories.description: As a poster, I want to pay for a task via Stripe escrow so funds are held until completion.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/payment/checkout_screen.dart with payment summary (bid amount, platform fee, total)
Create lib/features/payment/payment_service.dart wrapping flutter_stripe + Cloud Functions
PaymentService.createEscrowPayment() calls Cloud Function in asia-southeast1
PaymentService.presentPaymentSheet() presents Stripe sheet, returns true/false/throws
On payment success: task status advances to inProgress, SnackBar shown, pops back
CheckoutScreen route added to GoRouter; Stripe.publishableKey set in main.dart
flutter analyze passes with no warnings
